subject: Disable DMAAP-BC when aafEnabled flag is false
commit_message:
Disable DMAAP-BC when aafEnabled flag is false

Disable DMAPP-BC flag when aafEnabled flag is set to
true. DMAPP-BC component is unable to work without aaf

Issue-ID: OOM-2384
Change-Id: I82671fa063b3794a9b287e35f7a2e33fb504e9d0
Signed-off-by: Lucjan Bryndza <l.bryndza@samsung.com>

entries.message:
